User.title: User
User.description: A user of the Gita AI application.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user (from Firebase Auth).

name.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

mobile.description: The mobile number of the user.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user was created.

Guidance.title: Guidance
Guidance.description: A guidance session generated by the AI.

uid.description: The UID of the user who requested the guidance.

problem.description: The problem entered by the user.

language.description: The language selected for the guidance.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the guidance was generated.
